chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1448 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 Mr. Hamayoun Shaikh, Advocate for the respondent No.2. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G Sindh. Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, D.A.G. SIP Dhani Bux Bhutto on behalf of SSP, Sukkur, SIP Ghulam Asghar on behalf of SSP, Khairpur and SIP Ashiq Ali on behalf of SSP, Ghotki are present. **** Learned AAG files compliance reports on behalf of SSPs, Sukkur, Khairpur, Naushahro Feroze, DSPs, Mehrabpur, Naushahro Feroze, Kandiaro, Kamal Dero and SHO, P.S, Daharki for self and on behalf of SSP, Ghotki, taken on record and copies whereof are provided to Mr. Ali Akbar Shar, Advocate, who is holding brief on behalf of Mr. Ghulam Shabeer Shar, counsel for the petitioner, reported to be busy before another Bench of this Court. By directing the respondents to act strictly in accordance with law, we dispose of this petition. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
